component.name: TUIplay
component.summary: Terminal music player with queue, playlists & CD burning

description.p: TUIplay is a fast, keyboard-driven music player for the terminal. Browse your library, queue up tracks, edit metadata, save playlists, and export or burn audio CDs — all without leaving the command line.

ul.li: Playback: Opus, MP3, FLAC, WAV, AAC/M4A, Vorbis/OGG
Queue & playlist management with JSON persistence
Inline metadata editor (title, artist, album, genre)
Resume tracks from where you left off
Export playlists as Red Book CD images (WAV + CUE)
Burn directly to CD-R via cdrdao or wodim
Copy tracks to any folder (USB keys, etc.)
Multi-format playback (Opus, MP3, FLAC, WAV, AAC, Vorbis)
